name: android-dev-tools
description: Android development toolkit for Claude Code - build performance, remote signing, documentation, i18n, foldable screen support, code comments, UI automation, and marketplace management

plugins.name: android-dev-tools
plugins.description: All-in-one Android development toolkit. Includes: init-android (claude.md generator with checklist support), gradle-build-performance, apply-remote-sign, update-docs, android-i18n, android-fold-adapter, code-note, auto-ui-test, and update-remote-plugins skills.
